subject: Welcome to HDM BRIDGE - Your Email Platform is Ready
htmlBody:
🚀 HDM BRIDGE

Enterprise Email Platform

Welcome aboard, Davix!

Your email platform is fully operational. You can now send transactional and marketing emails via our API.

Your API Key:

hdm_xxxxxxxxxxxxx

Quick start:

  • 📡 Base URL: https://api.hdmbridge.com
  • 📧 Send endpoint: POST /api/emails/send
  • 📊 Track: GET /api/logs
View Documentation →

© 2026 HDM BRIDGE. All rights reserved.

This is a transactional email from your HDM BRIDGE account.
textBody: Welcome to HDM BRIDGE! Your email platform is ready. Send emails via our API. Base URL: https://api.hdmbridge.com. Documentation: https://hdmbridge.com/docs
